title: I went to my friend's factory for the first time.
description: On Friday evening, July 7, a Friend A, who is a developer at a large entertainment agency, contacted me to have lunch the next day. I really want t...

children.value: On Friday evening, July 7, a
Friend A

, who is a developer at a large entertainment agency, contacted me to have lunch the next day.
I really want to go out when I'm at home, but I was wondering what to do because I got lazy when I had to go out.
As soon as I thought about it, I immediately answered sushi to his message about what I wanted to eat.

The next day at lunch, a friend drove his car to pick me up 30 minutes earlier than scheduled.
When I asked if he bought it because it was a car he hadn't seen before, he said he inherited the car that his father-in-law was riding.
Married friends always told me to enjoy my solo life, but it was a moment when I suddenly wanted to get married.

props.alt: Sushi that my Friend A bought me

children.value: I talked about all sorts of things while eating sushi that my
Friend A

bought me.
Then naturally, the topic of conversation shifted about how other friends were doing, and then we talked about
Friend B,
who runs a factory in the suburbs outside of Seoul.
Friend A
said let's go meet to
Friend B
because he drove out anyway, and I contacted
Friend B

right away.
He said it would be difficult to see him for a long time because it was his father's birthday, but he thought about whether to go or not because he said it would be good if we came to meet.
Still, I thought I wouldn't be able to see you for a long time unless it was this time, so I said I would go back after seeing you briefly, and I left for my friend's factory.

props.alt: A factory run by Friend B

children.value: We arrived at the factory after an hour's drive, and
Friend B
's father greeted us on behalf of
Friend B

, who went to the client for a while.
We went empty-handed because we didn't know we would see him, but I thought it was polite to give him a gift, so I hurriedly went out to the city to buy a cake and give it to him as a gift, and he thanked me and invited me to dinner.
We met with
Friend B

who returned from the client and talked about the recent situation with each other, and especially talked a lot about how the factory is operated.
It was just amazing that my friend, who played with me immaturely as a child, became the president and ordered his subordinates to work. Also, I could feel that he had truly become the president, from his expression of skillfully handling the machine and seriously explaining the technology.
It was fun to talk to
Friend B
, but We put off the unfinished story and followed him to the dinner table because we shouldn't delay the dinner.

props.alt: in the middle of setting up dinner

children.value: The dinner was attended by the parents of
Friend B

, his sister's couple, and two nephews.
I sat down and exchanged glances with
Friend A
and regretted, 'I should have just refused and had a quick cup of coffee with
Friend B

The meal time has been quite long because you made so much food that there is not enough space to put even after attaching two tables.
Therefore, we talked a lot for a long time, and contrary to our concerns, we had a very fun time and even told us to sleep a day, so I sincerely agonized.
However, we returned to Seoul before it was too late because
Friend A
promised to pick up his wife.
On my way back. As it started to get dark and cool, I felt emotional, so I came back talking about the old days with my
Friend A

.
It was fun and nice to think of when I was young, but on the other hand, I felt strange when I realized that I was getting older.
